title: 10 best herbal tinctures for stiff neck
description: St John's Wort tinctures helps with stiff neck because of its potent anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The herb contains hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to inhibit the production of prostaglandins, which are known to cause inflammation and pain in the body. When taken as a tincture, St John's Wort can help to reduce swelling and relieve tension in the neck muscles, providing fast-acting relief from stiffness and discomfort.
